description_long: This handgun features a modern, angular design with a matte black finish and metallic silver accents along the slide and barrel. The grip is constructed from a wood-textured material, providing a warm contrast to the otherwise industrial appearance. The slide has three elongated, vertical cutouts on each side, likely for weight reduction or ventilation, and a solid, squared-off profile. The barrel is short and robust, with dual circular openings at the muzzle, suggesting a double-barrel or stylized design. The trigger guard is thick and integrated smoothly into the frame, with a straight lower edge and no visible undercuts. The overall form is compact and streamlined, suitable for urban environments where concealability and ease of handling are important.
description: A compact, modern handgun with a matte black body, metallic slide accents, and a wood-textured grip. Features include dual barrel openings, slide cutouts, and a thick, integrated trigger guard.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the squared-off muzzle and dual circular barrel openings.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the wood-textured grip, three vertical slide cutouts, and the metallic barrel accent running the length of the slide.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the slide and grip, with the dual barrels visible at the far end.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wood-textured grip, slide cutouts, and metallic barrel accent.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is rectangular with gently rounded edges and a pronounced taper toward the bottom, featuring a wood-textured surface that mimics natural grain. Its smooth finish is visually warm and contrasts with the rest of the handgun. There are no visible finger grooves, checkering, or logos, giving it a minimalist, classic appearance. The grip appears ergonomically contoured for comfort, with a slight flare at the base for improved retention.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and robust, with a straight lower edge and a squared-off profile. It is fully integrated into the frame, lacking undercuts or additional texturing. The design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments or reinforcement, and provides ample space for finger placement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and wide, with a dual circular muzzle opening, suggesting a double-barrel or stylized design. It features a metallic silver finish along its length, with no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The exterior is smooth and unmarked, contributing to the handgun's modern aesthetic.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The only notable features are the three elongated, vertical cutouts on each side, which serve as both a visual and functional design element.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no visible extensions, flares, or finger rests. Its design is simple and unadorned, matching the minimalist aesthetic of the grip and overall handgun.
